---
title: Extracting the integrated MB data for pySCENIC
date: 2023-05-11
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

## Goal of this analysis

To extract the counts, metadata, and UMAP embeddings from the Vladoiu medulloblastoma Seurat object (integrated using fastMNN) into CSV files to feed into the pySCENIC analysis file.


## Files and directories

### Code

See `<pyscenic software directory/seurat_to_scenic.R>`. This R script was called using the bash script in the output directory.

### Output

Output directory is at `<pyscenic results directory/20230511>`.


## Results

The fastMNN-integrated MB data (from Vladoiu et al. 2019) were used to generate three CSV files:

- `*.metadata.csv` contains the metadata (extracted from `srat@meta.data`)
- `*.rna_counts.csv` contains the raw counts (extracted from `srat[["RNA"]]@counts`)
- `*.umap_embeddings.csv` contains the UMAP embeddings (extracted from `srat[["umap"]]@cell.embeddings`)
